unit.comment: /*************************************************************************** * _ _ ____ _ * Project ___| | | | _ \| | * / __| | | | |_) | | * | (__| |_| | _ <| |___ * \___|\___/|_| \_\_____| * * Copyright (C) Daniel Stenberg, <daniel@haxx.se>, et al. * * This software is licensed as described in the file COPYING, which * you should have received as part of this distribution. The terms * are also available at https://curl.se/docs/copyright.html. * * You may opt to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute and/or sell * copies of the Software, and permit persons to whom the Software is * furnished to do so, under the terms of the COPYING file. * * This software is distributed on an "AS IS" basis, WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY * KIND, either express or implied. * * SPDX-License-Identifier: curl * ***************************************************************************/
/* <netinet/tcp.h> may need it */
/* for sockaddr_un */
/* for Curl_safefree() */
/* required for Curl_sockaddr_storage */
/* for vtsl cfilters */
/* for quic cfilters */
/* The last 3 #include files should be in this order */

/* * Curl_timeleft() returns the amount of milliseconds left allowed for the * transfer/connection. If the value is 0, there's no timeout (ie there's * infinite time left). If the value is negative, the timeout time has already * elapsed. * @param data the transfer to check on * @param nowp timestamp to use for calculation, NULL to use Curl_now() * @param duringconnect TRUE iff connect timeout is also taken into account. * @unittest: 1303 */

function.name: Curl_timeleft

unit.comment: /* Copies connection info into the transfer handle to make it available when the transfer handle is no longer associated with the connection. */

function.name: Curl_persistconninfo
addr_first_match
addr_next_match

unit.comment: /* retrieves ip address and port from a sockaddr structure. note it calls Curl_inet_ntop which sets errno on fail, not SOCKERRNO. */

function.name: Curl_addr2string
conn_is_conn

unit.comment: /* * Used to extract socket and connectdata struct for the most recent * transfer on the given Curl_easy. * * The returned socket will be CURL_SOCKET_BAD in case of failure! */

function.name: Curl_getconnectinfo
Curl_conncontrol
function.parameter_list: (struct connectdata *conn, int ctrl /* see defines in header */ #if defined(DEBUGBUILD) && !defined(CURL_DISABLE_VERBOSE_STRINGS) , const char *reason #endif )

unit.comment: /** * job walking the matching addr infos, creating a sub-cfilter with the * provided method `cf_create` and running setup/connect on it. */
unit.struct: struct eyeballer { const char *name; const struct Curl_addrinfo *first; /* complete address list, not owned */ const struct Curl_addrinfo *addr; /* List of addresses to try, not owned */ int ai_family; /* matching address family only */ cf_ip_connect_create *cf_create; /* for creating cf */ struct Curl_cfilter *cf; /* current sub-cfilter connecting */ struct eyeballer *primary; /* eyeballer this one is backup for */ timediff_t delay_ms; /* delay until start */ struct curltime started; /* start of current attempt */ timediff_t timeoutms; /* timeout for current attempt */ expire_id timeout_id; /* ID for Curl_expire() */ CURLcode result; int error; BIT(rewinded); /* if we rewinded the addr list */ BIT(has_started); /* attempts have started */ BIT(is_done); /* out of addresses/time */ BIT(connected); /* cf has connected */ BIT(inconclusive); /* connect was not a hard failure, we * might talk to a restarting server */ };
unit.comment: /* when there are more than one IP address left to use, this macro returns how much of the given timeout to spend on *this* attempt */

function.name: eyeballer_new
function.parameter_list: (struct eyeballer **pballer, cf_ip_connect_create *cf_create, const struct Curl_addrinfo *addr, int ai_family, struct eyeballer *primary, timediff_t delay_ms, timediff_t timeout_ms, expire_id timeout_id)

function.name: baller_close
baller_free
baller_rewind
baller_next_addr

unit.comment: /* * Initiate a connect attempt walk. * * Note that even on connect fail it returns CURLE_OK, but with 'sock' set to * CURL_SOCKET_BAD. Other errors will however return proper errors. */

function.name: baller_initiate

unit.comment: /** * Start a connection attempt on the current baller address. * Will return CURLE_OK on the first address where a socket * could be created and the non-blocking connect started. * Returns error when all remaining addresses have been tried. */

function.name: baller_start
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_cfilter *cf, struct Curl_easy *data, struct eyeballer *baller, timediff_t timeoutms)

unit.comment: /* Used within the multi interface. Try next IP address, returns error if no more address exists or error */

function.name: baller_start_next
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_cfilter *cf, struct Curl_easy *data, struct eyeballer *baller, timediff_t timeoutms)

function.name: baller_connect
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_cfilter *cf, struct Curl_easy *data, struct eyeballer *baller, struct curltime *now, bool *connected)

function.name: is_connected

unit.comment: /* * Connect to the given host with timeout, proxy or remote doesn't matter. * There might be more than one IP address to try out. */

function.name: start_connect
cf_he_ctx_clear
cf_he_adjust_pollset
cf_he_connect
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_cfilter *cf, struct Curl_easy *data, bool blocking, bool *done)

function.name: cf_he_close
cf_he_data_pending
get_max_baller_time
cf_he_query
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_cfilter *cf, struct Curl_easy *data, int query, int *pres1, void *pres2)

function.name: cf_he_destroy

unit.decl_stmt: struct Curl_cftype Curl_cft_happy_eyeballs = { "HAPPY-EYEBALLS", 0, CURL_LOG_LVL_NONE, cf_he_destroy, cf_he_connect, cf_he_close, Curl_cf_def_get_host, cf_he_adjust_pollset, cf_he_data_pending, Curl_cf_def_send, Curl_cf_def_recv, Curl_cf_def_cntrl, Curl_cf_def_conn_is_alive, Curl_cf_def_conn_keep_alive, cf_he_query, };
unit.comment: /** * Create a happy eyeball connection filter that uses the, once resolved, * address information to connect on ip families based on connection * configuration. * @param pcf output, the created cfilter * @param data easy handle used in creation * @param conn connection the filter is created for * @param cf_create method to create the sub-filters performing the * actual connects. */

function.name: cf_happy_eyeballs_create
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_cfilter **pcf, struct Curl_easy *data, struct connectdata *conn, cf_ip_connect_create *cf_create, const struct Curl_dns_entry *remotehost, int transport)

unit.decl_stmt: static #ifndef DEBUGBUILD const #endif struct transport_provider transport_providers[] = { { TRNSPRT_TCP, Curl_cf_tcp_create }, #ifdef ENABLE_QUIC { TRNSPRT_QUIC, Curl_cf_quic_create }, #endif #ifndef CURL_DISABLE_TFTP { TRNSPRT_UDP, Curl_cf_udp_create }, #endif #ifdef USE_UNIX_SOCKETS { TRNSPRT_UNIX, Curl_cf_unix_create }, #endif };

function.name: get_cf_create
cf_he_insert_after
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_cfilter *cf_at, struct Curl_easy *data, const struct Curl_dns_entry *remotehost, int transport)

function.name: cf_setup_connect
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_cfilter *cf, struct Curl_easy *data, bool blocking, bool *done)

function.name: cf_setup_close
cf_setup_destroy

unit.decl_stmt: struct Curl_cftype Curl_cft_setup = { "SETUP", 0, CURL_LOG_LVL_NONE, cf_setup_destroy, cf_setup_connect, cf_setup_close, Curl_cf_def_get_host, Curl_cf_def_adjust_pollset, Curl_cf_def_data_pending, Curl_cf_def_send, Curl_cf_def_recv, Curl_cf_def_cntrl, Curl_cf_def_conn_is_alive, Curl_cf_def_conn_keep_alive, Curl_cf_def_query, };

function.name: cf_setup_create
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_cfilter **pcf, struct Curl_easy *data, const struct Curl_dns_entry *remotehost, int transport, int ssl_mode)

function.name: cf_setup_add
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, struct connectdata *conn, int sockindex, const struct Curl_dns_entry *remotehost, int transport, int ssl_mode)

unit.comment: /* used by unit2600.c */

function.name: Curl_debug_set_transport_provider

unit.comment: /* DEBUGBUILD */

function.name: Curl_cf_setup_insert_after
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_cfilter *cf_at, struct Curl_easy *data, const struct Curl_dns_entry *remotehost, int transport, int ssl_mode)

function.name: Curl_conn_setup
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, struct connectdata *conn, int sockindex, const struct Curl_dns_entry *remotehost, int ssl_mode)
